category_sources: source_facts.description says TypeScript-to-Luau Compiler for Roblox; official GitHub README says roblox-ts bridges TypeScript to Roblox/Luau.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is roblox-ts; official GitHub README and official docs use roblox-ts.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official roblox-ts site; official GitHub README links to roblox-ts.com documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub organization page and repository identify roblox-ts/roblox-ts as the TypeScript-to-Luau compiler project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify TypeScript, Luau, compiler, Roblox, and CLI executable rbxtsc.
